subject: Rufflet, a small white and blue eagle chick Pokemon with a red marking on its forehead, perched in a nest in a forest setting
description: Rufflet sits in a nest made of twigs and plant material, surrounded by the green of a forest environment. The creature is small and compact, with predominantly white fluffy plumage and blue wing feathers visible. A red circular marking adorns its forehead above a determined-looking expression. Trees and dappled forest light fill the background. The scene has a naturalistic, warm-light feel, the creature looking young and slightly defiant despite its small size.
foreground: Rufflet sitting in a twig nest
background: Forest with trees and dappled green light
emotion: determined and alert; upright posture and direct gaze suggest stubborn independence
